weakest: Section 1 contains a drafting error with repeated "normalization" ("hosted records normalization, normalization, mapping...") that makes the prose less professional.
Section 6 heading "Notice Regarding Protected Records" uses an undefined term and is inconsistent with the defined term "Security Incident" used throughout the section.
Section 15 refers to "service-level commitments" as if they are expressly stated in the Agreement, but no such commitments appear, creating a dangling cross-reference.
